calendar.matters:
ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-538731 WITH CASE CGC-14-538172
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gianina A. Dimitriou, Esq. of the Law Office of McDowell Shaw & Garcia, T:925.210.1300, for defendant and moving party;
Brian M. Schnarr, Esq. of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy LLP, T:650.697.6000, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Plaintiff's counsel does not oppose the consolidation, but at the same time, does not want to lose the trial date that has been assigned to Case CGC-14-538731. The Court modified its tentative ruling by changing the lead case; defendant's counsel did not raise any objection. After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANTS STARLITE ELECTRIC, INC. and CHIK SZE's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-538731 WITH CASE CGC-14-538172 for all purposes is granted, for good cause shown. Pursuant to CRC 3.350, the lead case number is CGC-14-538731. Parties are ordered to meet and confer to coordinate discovery to avoid repetition. ORDER SIGNED. A copy of this order is to be filed in both actions. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Assigned To Arbitration On Oct-20-14
